economic_notes: Operates Crane Cove Seafoods Limited Partnership (99.99% share), Eskasoni Supermarket Limited (modified equity, excluded from consolidation due to insufficient financial information), Eskasoni Tobacco Shop, Eskasoni Gaming Centre, Eskasoni Gaming Commission, Eskasoni Recreation Centre, Sarah Denny Cultural Centre, Eskasoni Fitness Centre. Significant fishing license acquisitions in 2021 ($9,284,035). COVID-19 pandemic expenditures of $4,881,520.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because Eskasoni Supermarket Limited (a controlled other government organization) was not consolidated due to management's inability to provide adequate financial information; recorded on modified equity basis instead. Significant increase in fishing licenses from $11,510,189 to $19,052,424 due to $9,284,035 in new acquisitions. COVID-19 pandemic expenditures of $4,881,520 recorded. Total government transfers calculated as sum of ISC + Mi'kmaw Kina'matnewey + FNIHB + METS + CMHC + DFO + Infrastructure Canada + Province of NS + Other agencies and funds. OSR = unincorporated enterprises revenue + Crane Cove partnership earnings.
